name: Bangalore Torpedo 4 x 6 ft
description: The Bangalore Torpedo is designed to produce a continuous line charge for breaching barbed wire entanglements and for clearing the mines and other explosive devices from the surface of the terrain. Torpedoes fitted with connection pieces make up the standard charge. Each charge is filled with ammonal and with a booster fitted into each end.

specs.Main filling: Ammonal powder-mixture of: ammonium nitrate ~65 % TNT ~20 % Al powder ~15 %
specs.Initiation: The charge can be initiated using either an electric or non-electric detonator with initiating strength at least as No.8.
specs.Use: The Bangalore Torpedo can be used individually or as continuous line charge of any length. The charges are directly fitted with connection pieces and can be assembled in any order. A solid nose cone is clipped into the first charge to facilitate access through an obstacle. A detonator is fitted to the detonator well of last charge for initiation.

name: Bangalore Torpedo 8 x 1 m
description: The Bangalore Torpedo is designed to produce a continuous line charge for breaching barbed wire entanglements and for clearing the mines and other explosive devices from the surface of the terrain. Torpedoes fitted with connection pieces make up the standard charge. Each charge is filled with ammonal and with a booster fitted into each end.

specs.Main filling: Ammonal powder-mixture of: Ammonium nitrate ~65 % TNT ~20 % Al powder ~15 %
specs.Initiation: The charge can be initiated using either an electric or non-electric detonator with initiating strength at least as No.8.
specs.Use: The Bangalore Torpedo can be used individually or as continuous line charge of any length. The charges are directly fitted with connection pieces and can be assembled in any order. A solid nose cone is clipped into the first charge to facilitate access through an obstacle. A detonator is fitted to the detonator well of last charge for initiation.

name: Demolition charge HAYRICK
description: HAYRICK is a military-grade V-shaped linear cutting demolition charge designed for effective breaching of structural steel and reinforced concrete targets.

specs.Initiation: Initiation is usually by the detonating cord of the nominal weight at least 12 g of PETN/m passed through the hole in the priming pellet. The charge can be also initiated using either an electric or non-electric detonator with initiating strength at least as No.8.
specs.Use: The HAYRICK can be used either as individual charge or as necklace. Due to nails packed along with the charge, the HAYRICK can be linked as linear shaped charge depending on the desired effect and the nature of the object to be destroyed.

name: Demolition charge TNT 250 g
description: The 250 g TNT demolition charge is a standard military explosive designed for a wide range of demolition applications.

specs.Case material: Waterproof cardboard case protected with paraffin coating with printed inscription
specs.Initiation: The charge can be initiated using either an electric or non-electric detonator with initiating strength at least as No.8.
specs.Use: For standard demolition tasks. Can be used under water.

name: Demolition charge TNT 500 g
description: The 500 g TNT demolition charge is a standard military explosive designed for a wide range of demolition applications.

specs.Case material: Waterproof cardboard case protected with paraffin coating with printed inscription
specs.Initiation: The charge can be initiated using either an electric or non-electric detonator with initiating strength at least as No.8.
specs.Use: For standard demolition tasks. Can be used under water.

name: Shaped charge BEEHIVE
description: The BEEHIVE is a shaped charge device designed for destruction of objects, structures and create craters. In the kit, there are three legs which should be attached during the charge set up, which allows for the optimal stand-off distance and ensuring peak performance of the shaped charge.

specs.Case material: Steel case DC04-A-m and copper liner Cu-ETP R220
specs.Initiation: The charge can be initiated using either an electric or non-electric detonator with initiating strength at least as No.8.
specs.Use: The BEEHIVE can be used only with attached legs to reach optimal performance of the shaped charge.

name: BLACK DOUGH
description: BLACK DOUGH is a PETN-based plastic explosive widely used for specialized military and police demolition tasks as well as for industrial blasting applications.

specs.Initiation: BLACK DOUGH can be initiated using either an electric or non-electric detonator with initiating strength at least as No.8.
specs.Use: BLACK DOUGH has excellent mouldability and adhesive properties even in the hardest environmental and temperature conditions and can be used for underwater blast operations.

name: Mortar round 120 mm HE
description: The 120 mm mortar round is intended for firing stationary unprotected targets, troop concentrations, transport convoys, gun nests.
compatibility: For mortars 120mm – 2B11, M38, M43, M82, M85

specs.Description of the product: Mortar round 120 mm HE consists of mortar bomb and 6 increment charges. Mortar bomb consists of body filled with TNT explosive fitted with adapter with booster and point detonating fuze, stabilizer fitted with an ignition cartridge.

name: Projectile 155 mm HE M107
description: The projectile consists of steel shell body filled with TNT. A threaded lifting plug closes the fuze cavity at the nose of the projectile for handling and storage. Point detonating, proximity or multi-option fuzes may be used with this projectile.

specs.Use: The projectile 155mm HE M107 is used as a part of complete round 155mm HE M107 which consists of projectile with fuze, propelling charge and primer. The round 155mm HE M107 is fired from 155mm howitzers and is used for blast effect and fragmentation.

name: Propelling charge M4A2-CHARGE 7
description: M4A2-Charge 7 is propelling charge designed to be used primarily with 155 mm M107 projectiles for firing in zone 7. The propelling charge contains tubular powder NDT-3 type or equivalent and is equipped with Igniter and Flash reducer.

specs.Muzzle velocity (m/s): 568 (with projectile 155 mm HE M107 and barrel length 39 calibers)
specs.Maximum range (km): 14,7 (with projectile 155 mm HE M107 and barrel length 39 calibers)

name: Rocket 122 mm HE GRAD
description: Rocket 122 mm HE GRAD is intended for fire support against fortified, light armoured or non-armoured targets. It is designed to incapacitate enemy troops and to neutralize enemy command posts and communication centres.
compatibility: BM-21 and RM-70 multiple-launch rocket systems.

specs.Description of the product: Rocket 122 mm HE GRAD consists of rocket motor, warhead and fuze. The warhead is filled with TNT explosive and fitted with transport plug. The fuze MRV-U is placed separately inside the transport box.

name: Round 152 mm HE with full charge
description: Round is intended to be fired from 152 mm howitzers for destroying enemy manpower in the open or in the field-type shelters, fighting artillery and destroying light armoured vehicles and equipment, also intended for making passages in mine fields and defence wirings

specs.Description of the product: Round 152 mm HE with full charge consists of projectile and propelling charge ŽN-546. The projectile is filled with TNT explosive and fitted with a V-429 fuze, alternatively with RGM-2 or RGM-6

name: Round 122 mm HE with full charge
description: Round 122 mm HE with full charge is intended to be fired from 122 mm D-30 and 2S1 howitzers for destroying enemy manpower in the open or in the field-type shelters, also intended for making passages in mine fields and defense wirings, fightning artillery and destroying light armoured vehicles and equipment.

specs.Description of the product: Round 122 mm HE with full charge consists of HE-462 projectile (equivalent to the OF-462 projectile) and Ž 9-1 cartridge, which is manufactured with steel cartridge case. The projectile is filled with TNT explosive and fitted with a V-429 fuze, alternatively with RGM-2 or RGM-6.

name: Round PG-7VM
description: Round PG-7VM is designed for destroying armoured vehicles by piercing the armour by HEAT effect. The round can be also used to destroy enemy mechanized troops, and manpower in field-type and urban-type shelters.

specs.Description of the product: Round PG-7VM consists of anti-tank grenade PG-7GM and propelling charge PG-7PM. Grenade PG-7GM consists of rocket motor PG-7DM and HEAT warhead PG-7M. The warhead is filled with A-IX-1 explosive and fitted with a VP-7M piezoelectric fuze, alternatively with the VP-22 equivalent.
specs.Use: Round PG-7VM is designed for firing from RPG-7 type launcher. The round is assembled from grenade and propelling charge before use.
specs.Type: Piezoelectric with instantaneous action, distant arming and a self-destruction mechanism

name: Round PG-7VM PRACTICE-T
description: Round PG-7VM PRACTICE-T has the same weight and dimension parameters as PG-7VM round. It is used for cost-effective training of own units with RPG-7 type of launchers.

specs.Description of the product: Round PG-7VM PRACTICE-T consists of training grenade PG-7GM PRACTICE and propelling charge PG-7PM. Grenade PG-7GM PRACTICE consists of rocket motor PG-7DM and inert warhead PG-7M PRACTICE. The warhead is without explosive and fitted with a VP-7 PRACTICE fuze.
specs.Use: Round PG-7VM PRACTICE-T is designed for firing from RPG-7 type launcher. The round is assembled from grenade and propelling charge before use.

name: Round TB-7VM
description: Round TB-7VM is designed for destroying enemy manpower, observation posts and lightly armoured and unarmoured equipment, which are affected mainly by the overpressure created by detonation of thermobaric explosive.

specs.Description of the product: Round TB-7VM consists of thermobaric grenade TB-7GM and propelling charge PG-7PM. Grenade TB-7GM consists of rocket motor PG-7DM and thermobaric warhead TB-7. The warhead is filled with thermobaric explosive TBS and fitted with a FH-2D fuze.
specs.Use: Round TB-7VM is designed for firing from RPG-7 type launcher. The round is assembled from grenade and propelling charge before use.

name: SCORPIO .223 Rem FMJ 3,56 g
description: Rifle ammunition in .223 Remington calibre for professional deployment and training.

name: SCORPIO .308 Win FMJ 9,50 g
description: Rifle ammunition in .308 Winchester calibre for professional deployment.

name: SCORPIO 5,56 × 45 mm M193 NATO
description: Rifle ammunition in 5.56 × 45 mm calibre to NATO M193 specification, 4 g.

name: SCORPIO 7,62 × 39 mm FMJ 8 g
description: Rifle ammunition in 7.62 × 39 mm calibre for professional deployment, with a full metal jacket bullet, 8 g.

name: SCORPIO 9 mm Luger FMJ 7,5 g
description: Pistol ammunition in 9 × 19 mm calibre for professional use by armed forces. Full metal jacket bullet, 7.5 g, manufactured to civilian CIP standards.

name: SCORPIO 9 mm Luger TFMJ 8 g
description: Pistol ammunition in 9 × 19 mm calibre with a full metal jacket 8 g TFMJ bullet, for professional use.

name: SCORPIO 9 × 19 mm FMJ 8 g NATO
description: Pistol ammunition in 9 × 19 mm calibre to NATO specification. Full metal jacket bullet, 8 g.
